title: , Patriarch of Constantinople
name: Elisha
Methodius
troparia: (Tone 4) An angel in the flesh, a foundation of the prophets,* another forerunner of Christ’s coming,* glorious Elijah, sent to Elisha from on high* the grace to dispel diseases and to purify lepers** therefore he pours forth healings upon those who venerate him.

(Tone 4) Burning with zeal for the holy icons, O most wise saint,* you boldly opposed the malice of the king.* You were shut in a tomb and thus inherited the spacious dwellings in high.* From there, do not forget us who sing in your memory,** O most blessed pastor Methodius.
kontakia: (Tone 4) O blessed Elisha, you lived the life of a prophet of God.* You received a double portion of grace, truly worthy of you,* as you became a co-inhabitant with Elijah.* Together with him, unceasingly intercede with Christ our God for all of us.

(Tone 2) You lived like an angel on earth* and inherited heaven for a reward, O Methodius.* Having clearly revealed the reverence that was due icons,* you were subjected to agonies and terrible hardships.* But this did not deter you from your path of truth* as you condemned those who cast out the icons of Christ.
